Interface AlgorithmProvider

All Known Subinterfaces:
AudioAlgorithmBackend<T>, AudioEngine, BayesianInferenceProvider, DistributedComputingProvider, FEMProvider, FFTProvider, GeneticAlgorithmProvider, GraphAlgorithmProvider, LatticeBoltzmannProvider, LinearAlgebraProvider<E>, MandelbrotProvider, MaxwellProvider, MLProvider, MolecularDynamicsProvider, MonteCarloProvider, NavierStokesProvider, NBodyProvider, ODEProvider, QuantumAlgorithmProvider, ReduceProvider, SCFProvider, SimulationProvider, SparseLinearAlgebraProvider<E>, SPHFluidProvider, TensorBackend, TensorProvider, VisionAlgorithmBackend<T>, WaveProvider
All Known Implementing Classes:
AmazonBraketBackend, CARMALinearAlgebraProvider, ColtLinearAlgebraProvider, CommonsMathLinearAlgebraProvider, CPUDenseLinearAlgebraProvider, CPUDenseTensorBackend, CPUSparseLinearAlgebraProvider, CPUSparseTensorBackend, CUDABackend, CUDANBodyProvider, CUDATensorProvider, CUDAVisionProvider, DenseNeuralProvider, DistributedLinearAlgebraProvider, DistributedNBodyProvider, EJMLLinearAlgebraProvider, GraphAlgorithmProviderImpl, GRPCLinearAlgebraBackend, HDF5IOProvider, JavaAWTVisionBackend, JavaCVBackend, JavaCVEngine, JavaSoundBackend, JBlasLinearAlgebraProvider, JBulletSimulationProvider, MinimBackend, MPIComputingProvider, MulticoreAudioBackend, MulticoreBayesianInferenceProvider, MulticoreFEMProvider, MulticoreFFTProvider, MulticoreFuzzyProvider, MulticoreGeneticAlgorithmProvider, MulticoreGraphAlgorithmProvider, MulticoreLatticeBoltzmannProvider, MulticoreMandelbrotProvider, MulticoreMaxwellProvider, MulticoreMLProvider, MulticoreMolecularDynamicsProvider, MulticoreMonteCarloProvider, MulticoreNavierStokesProvider, MulticoreNBodyProvider, MulticoreSCFProvider, MulticoreSimulationProvider, MulticoreSPHFluidProvider, MulticoreVisionProvider, MulticoreWaveProvider, NativeArrowProvider, NativeCPULinearAlgebraBackend, NativeFFMBLASBackend, NativeFFTProvider, NativeMulticoreLinearAlgebraProvider, NativePhysicsProvider, NativeQuantumProvider, NativeSIMDLinearAlgebraBackend, NativeTensorProvider, NativeVisionProvider, ND4JBaseTensorBackend, ND4JCUDATensorBackend, ND4JLinearAlgebraProvider, ND4JNativeTensorBackend, ND4JSparseTensorBackend, ONNXProvider, OpenCLFFTProvider, OpenCLLatticeBoltzmannProvider, OpenCLLinearAlgebraBackend, OpenCLNBodyProvider, OpenCLVisionProvider, ParallelSimulationProvider, PythonQuantumBackend, QiskitBackend, Quantum4JBackend, RungeKuttaODEProvider, SparkComputingProvider, StandardFFTProvider, StandardLinearAlgebraProvider, StrangeBackend, StrassenLinearAlgebraProvider, TarsosBackend, VariableEliminationProvider, VLCJBackend, VLCJEngine
public interface AlgorithmProvider
Base interface for high-level scientific algorithm providers. Discovery is based on ServiceLoader and priority.
Since:
1.2
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default String
    getAlgorithmType()
    Returns the unique category of the algorithm.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the human-readable name of the provider.
    default int
    getPriority()
    Returns the execution priority (higher is better).
    default boolean
    isAvailable()
    Checks if the provider is available in the current environment.
    default double
    score(OperationContext context)
    Scores this provider for a specific operation context.

  • Method Details

    • getName

      String getName()
      Returns the human-readable name of the provider.

    • getPriority

      default int getPriority()
      Returns the execution priority (higher is better).

    • isAvailable

      default boolean isAvailable()
      Checks if the provider is available in the current environment.

    • getAlgorithmType

      default String getAlgorithmType()
      Returns the unique category of the algorithm.

    • score

      default double score(OperationContext context)
      Scores this provider for a specific operation context.

      Higher scores indicate better suitability. Used by ProviderSelector for context-aware selection.

      Default implementation returns getPriority(), so existing providers behave identically without changes.

      Parameters:
      context - the operation context (data size, hints, etc.)
      Returns:
      suitability score (higher = better)
